ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES league ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "gb" REAL /* Games behind the leader */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home record (wins-losses) */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Away record (wins-losses) */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team within its division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_teams" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game for which the statistic is recorded */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)
column_names: Total runs scored by the team
Total runs allowed by the team
Rank of the team within its division
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
Date of the game for which the statistic is recorded
